name: codex-usage-tray
description: Windows notification-area monitor for locally recorded Codex usage limits.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex usage limits from the Windows tray.
interface.longDescription: A local Windows tray companion that reads the latest Codex session usage snapshot and shows the 5-hour and weekly limit status without sending account data anywhere.
interface.defaultPrompt: Install or troubleshoot the Codex Usage Tray Windows companion.
